title: crotalaria juncea var. bengalensis
intro: Crotalaria juncea var. bengalensis, also known as Bengal thread plant, is a perennial plant species belonging to the legume family. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and alleviating digestive problems. In traditional medicine, Crotalaria juncea var. bengalensis is prepared in various herbal forms, including decoctions, infusions, and poultices, to harness its medicinal properties.
